# Agency Founder Finance

> Specialist UK accountants for agency founders — marketing, creative, digital, advertising, PR, web design, SEO, recruitment, AI, SaaS and more. UK + Dubai dual presence for founders who travel or relocate. All figures use 2025/26 UK tax rates.

## About

Agency Founder Finance provides specialist accounting, tax planning, R&D tax credit claims, IR35 advice, incorporation strategy and exit advisory services to founders of UK agencies. We work exclusively with agency businesses across 19 sub-types and operate a Dubai desk for founders relocating to the UAE — one of the most common UK agency-founder relocation routes.

Coverage: UK (with city presence in London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Bristol) and Dubai (UAE). All tax content is current to 2025/26 UK figures, including BADR (14% rising to 18% on 6 April 2026, £1M lifetime limit), corporation tax (19%/25% with marginal relief £50k–£250k), dividend tax (10.75% / 35.75% / 39.35% from 6 Apr 2026 per FA 2026), dividend allowance £500, employer NI 15% above the £5,000 secondary threshold (Employment Allowance £10,500), VAT threshold £90,000, and MTD ITSA staging (April 2026 for £50k+, April 2027 for £30k+).
